title: Mediterranean Summer Influencer
promptText: Medium shot captured in a high-contrast, sun-drenched coastal environment, utilizing harsh, directional light to create deep shadows and brilliant highlights. Positioned against rugged, light-colored rocky cliffs and the deep blue sea, looking off to the side with a relaxed, squinting expression. A vibrant, yellow and pink hibiscus-patterned bikini top provides a bold splash of color. Dark, rectangular sunglasses and delicate gold chain necklaces add polished glamour. The lighting creates a glistening effect on the skin, emphasizing the warmth. Tight, focused, candid maritime atmosphere.
